svg.text: Named bundles of toggle values that work together — pick one to start, tune from there, avoid the anti-presets

g.text: Presets are starting points, not commitments — Bootstrap graduates to Conservative or Balanced after cycle one.
each stacks loosened settings multiplicatively; combined, they dismantle the guardrails
parallel + low-tier Doer + trusted + no toolings
sacrifices: the trust anchor; founder becomes the bottleneck
No preset can toggle the axioms, guardrails, or load-bearing invariants — tuning changes how fast and how cheap, never what is correct.
Pick the preset that matches your context, adopt its bundle, then tune individual dials within their flip-timing class.
